world.title: Patrick Kee is Malaysian victim in West Kalimantan heli crash, say reports
world.description: JAKARTA: Malaysian Patrick Kee is one among the eight victims who perished in a helicopter crash in West Kalimantan, according to reports.

world.title: Iran foreign minister says Strait of Hormuz ‘completely open’
world.description: Iran says ‘passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz’ open during the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

world.title: Bishops of Angola hope Pope's visit will boost Angolan youth
world.description: Pope Leo will visit Angola on April 18, as part of a trip to Africa which includes Algeria, Cameroon, and Equatorial Guinea.

world.title: Pope Leo visits St. Paul Catholic Hospital in Cameroon
world.description: Pope Leo XIV makes a private visit to St. Paul Catholic Hospital in Douala, visiting and praying with patients, families, and hospital staff.

world.title: A Time of Hope and Peril
world.description: Maybe it has to get worse before it gets better.

world.title: US are planning for an industrial hub in the Philippines. What does this mean?
world.description: The US and Philippines are planning a 4,000-acre industrial hub in Luzon to strengthen critical supply chains and enhance economic security. Read more at straitstimes.com.

business.title: Seven charged in scheme that used AI tools to defraud Toronto-area stores: police
business.description: Police say they have charged seven people in a fraud investigation after suspects allegedly used AI-enabled tools to target retail locations across the Greater Toronto Area.

business.title: Brooklyn locals infuriated by Dinosaur Bar-B-Que closure
business.description: Dinosaur Bar-B-Que will be closing its doors at its Brooklyn location later this spring after 15 years in the spot.

business.title: Jio Financial Q4 Results Highlights: PAT slumps 14% YoY to ₹272 crore; dividend of ₹0.60 announced
business.description: Jio Financial Q4 Results LIVE: Reliance group firm Jio Financial Q4 results date is today, April 17. The board will also consider the announcement of a dividend. Jio Financial share price closed 1.5% higher ahead of earnings.

business.description: Energy Security Top Of The Bill As African Oil Refiners Resolve Robust Defences Against The Vagaries Of International Markets At Arda 20th Annual...

business.title: HKEX proposes halving share settlement cycle in bid to boost Hong Kong’s financial profile
business.description: Bourse operator launches a consultation on shortening the share settlement cycle to one day, aiming to implement the reform in late 2027.

business.title: Federal govt needs to review conditions for EV plants in Malaysia; BYD CKD must remain in Perak
business.description: Perak industry and investment committee chairman Loh Sze Yee has said that the federal government of Malaysia needs to re-evaluate the conditions for electric vehicle companies planning to set up factories in the nation, reported …

business.title: SAIT cutting at least 30 positions, citing declining enrolment
business.description: SAIT is cutting dozens of positions, according to an internal email obtained by CBC News. The educational institution told the CBC in a statement the cuts are due to lower enrolment and shifts in government policy regarding international students.

business.title: Reassessing MicroStrategy (MSTR) Valuation After A 15.8% Weekly Share Price Move
business.description:
Event context and recent stock move
Strategy (MSTR) has recently attracted attention after a 3.8% one-day gain and a 15.8% move over the past week, prompting investors to reassess how its bitcoin treasury focus and software operations fit into their portfolios.
See our latest analysis for Strategy.
This recent 15.8% 7 day share price return comes after a weaker patch, with a 90 day share price decline of 14.3%, while the 3 year total shareholder return remains very large.
If you are watching...

science.title: MIND BLOWN! See 47 million galaxies in the largest 3D map of the universe. Each dot in this photo is a galaxy
science.description: Scientists have created the largest map of the universe showing 47 million galaxies. The images were captured over five years by the 5,000 eyes of the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument. The project will soon reveal additional data on dark energy.

science.title: Aurora may be visible in various US states due to sun hole
science.description: The aurora borealis could grace the skies in parts of the US, including New York, thanks to a large hole that's opened up in the Sun's atmosphere.

science.title: Shenzhou-21 Crew To Extend Stay For Additional Month
science.description: The three-person crew of Shenzhou-21 will remain in orbit for about one additional month to validate technologies onboard the Tiangong Space Station.

science.title: The Engineers Who Reached for the Moon: How RPI Became a Launchpad to the Stars
science.description: When Reid Wiseman ‘97 strapped into the Orion spacecraft in April for humanity's first lunar voyage in more than half a century, he carried with him not just the hopes of a new generation of space explorers, but the legacy of the nation's oldest technical school — one that has quietly shaped America's journey to the cosmos.

science.title: Ancient teeth reveal clues to the environment humans’ early ancestors evolved in millions of years ago
science.description: Through fossilized tooth enamel, scientists are reconstructing the diets and landscapes that existed millions of years ago. We really are what we eat.

science.title: Northern lights could be visible as far south as Illinois and Oregon tonight
science.description: Northern lights may be visible as far south as Illinois and Oregon tonight as speedy solar wind is set to trigger geomagnetic storm conditions.

science.title: First Black Hole Ever Discovered 62 Years Ago Is Emitting Jets With Energy Of 10,000 Suns
science.description: Originally discovered in 1964, Cygnus X-1 is blasting "dancing jets" into space with the force of 10,000 Suns.

science.title: Giant Magellan Telescope and Coquimbo Regional Government Sign Strategic Partnership to Strengthen Chile’s Astronomy Industry
science.description: New partnership advances regional economic growth through astronomy and positions Coquimbo region as Chile’s global hub for science, technology, and innovation

ai.title: Chief Justice Of India Warns Advocates-On-Record Against Outsourcing Legal Work To AI Tools
ai.description: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant on Friday warned newly inducted advocates-on-record against outsourcing legal work to AI or third parties. Speaking at their induction in New Delhi, he stressed that AoRs must personally draft pleadings, verify facts and exercise due diligence, adding that every filing reflects their professional integrity and responsibility to the Supreme Court.

ai.description: NEA workshop highlights practical AI use cases in nuclear regulation, stressing frameworks, human oversight, and secure on-premise models for deployment
